error.break_connection: We couldn’t reset this connection. Please try again.
error.confirm_account: We couldn’t confirm your account. Please try again.

error.connect_account: We couldn’t connect your account. Please try again.
error.delete_account_check_connection: Deletion failed. Please check your connection and try again in a few seconds.
error.exclude_account: We couldn’t exclude your account. Please try again.
error.hosted_link_failed_description: We couldn’t finish linking your account. Please try again.
error.remove_connection: We couldn’t remove this connection. Please try again.
error.repair_connection: We couldn’t repair the Plaid connection with your account. Please try again.
error.save_data_try_again_later: An error occurred while saving data. You will have an opportunity to try again later.
error.start_connection: We couldn’t initiate the Plaid connection flow. Please try again.
error.unlink_failed: Unlink failed. Please check your connection and try again in a few seconds.

label.account_and_unmatched_transactions_delet: This account and any unmatched transactions will be deleted.

label.link_your_bank_accounts_description: Linking your bank accounts allows us to load your bank transactions and automatically categorize them.

Reconnect your bank accounts and credit cards to automatically import your business transactions.
